difficulty_desc: 单物品/单人物 + 单场景 + 单镜头

warnings: subtle emotion may be hard to verify in long/full shots
explosion with no subject action is valid but needs clear staging to remain coherent
suggestions: express weak emotion through posture, silhouette, or gaze rather than face detail
make the explosion distant or environmental while the subject stays still

compiler_notes.goal: compile tags into an evaluable storyboard testcase before compressing into a final video prompt
compiler_notes.rule: preserve primary tags first, then secondary tags, then stylistic tags
